name: python3-zombie-telnetlib
title: python3-zombie-telnetlib
summary: copy of telnetlib that was removed from Python standard library
description:
copy of telnetlib that was removed from Python standard library
Python 3.13 removed a large amount of so called 'dead battery' libraries
from the standard library. As such, code that imports these libraries
will no longer work in Python 3.13.
.
This is a pristine copy of the removed telnetlib.
.
https://peps.python.org/pep-0594/#deprecated-modules
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-zombie-telnetlib because copy of telnetlib that was removed from Python standard library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-zombie-telnetlib as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-zombie-telnetlib with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-zombie-telnetlib --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
